# PR Summary

## PR Type
- [ ] Experiment (`exp/*`)
- [ ] Promotion Candidate (`harden/*`)
- [ ] Hardening/Production
- [ ] Hotfix

## Hypothesis (required for experiments)
If we change:

Then this user behavior should improve:

Because:

- 
-

## Evidence Snapshot (required for experiments and promotion candidates)
- Demo link or recording:
- Before/after flow:
- Key metrics observed:
- Decision rubric score (1-25):

## Risk Review
- Product risk:
- Technical risk:
- Security/compliance risk:
- Operational risk:

## Feature Flag and Rollback (required)
- Feature flag name:
- Default state:
- Rollback method:

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Smoke test run
- [ ] Manual verification notes included

Manual verification notes:
1. 
2.

## Observability
- [ ] Logging added/updated
- [ ] Metrics added/updated
- [ ] Alerts reviewed/added

## Promotion Checklist (required for hardening/production)
- [ ] Product validation complete
- [ ] Engineering quality complete
- [ ] Security baseline complete
- [ ] CI checks green
- [ ] Owners identified for rollout and monitoring

## Rollout Plan
- Rollout strategy (dark launch, percentage, cohort):
- Stop conditions:
- Owner on point:

## Labels
- [ ] `experiment`
- [ ] `promote-candidate`
- [ ] `hardened`
- [ ] `kill`
- [ ] `needs-security-review`
